title: Fix: Resource leak in file handling
original_text: Fixed resource leak in file handling. Files were not being properly closed. Implemented context managers for file operations. Added resource cleanup in error handlers. Implemented resource leak detection. Result: resource leak fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix resource leak in file handling
expected_body_lines: - Fix files not being properly closed
- Implement context managers for file operations
- Add resource cleanup in error handlers
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix resource leak in file handling"
